mapper.sql: v.er_id, v.vrfr_sn, v.vrfcn_inst_id, v.cnct_desc, v.accrd_dtl, v.use_bgng_dt, v.use_end_dt, v.frst_reg_dt, v.frst_reg_user_id, v.last_chg_dt, v.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM er.tn_er_vrfr_info v WHERE v.er_id = #{erId} AND NOW() BETWEEN v.use_bgng_dt AND v.use_end_dt ORDER BY v.vrfr_sn ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_er_vrfr_info (er_id, vrfr_sn, vrfcn_inst_id, cnct_desc, accrd_dtl, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{erId}, #{vrfrSn}, #{vrfcnInstId}, #{cnctDesc}, #{accrdDtl}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})

INSERT INTO er.tn_er_vrfr_info (er_id, vrfr_sn, vrfcn_inst_id, cnct_desc, accrd_dtl, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) SELECT #{dstErId}, vrfr_sn, vrfcn_inst_id, cnct_desc, accrd_dtl, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} FROM er.tn_er_vrfr_info WHERE er_id = #{srcErId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
